titleStmt.title: SII 9.467: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 467. (A.R. No. 371-A of 1921.) IN THE SAME PLACE.

summary.p: This is dated in the cyclic year Khara and records the gift of some plots of land by the same individual as the one mentioned in No. 465 for burning five perpetual lamps in the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vikṛtisaṁvatsarake saluva kharasaṁvatsara padinēḷane śrīmatu Aṁṇamaresayyana kāryyake kartarāda tiṁmanāyakaru Alliya vīradēvara guḍiya sthānikarige samasta kāryya nāu vīraṭadēvarige baṁdu tiru
nāḷige biṭṭa tribhuvanamahādēvipaṭṭana mosaguḷattūru grāmadalu tiṁgaḷige tirinaṁdādī vigege naṁjeneladali koṭṭudu nāḍa AḷuUva kōlu mā 5 Akṣāradalū Ayidu māu naṁje nelavanū sarvamānyavāgi
koṭṭevāgi Ī dīvige Ayidanū tapade yikki �yo Ayidu mā nelanū niṁma putrapautrapāraṁparyyavāgi Ācaṁtrarkkasthāyiyāgi Anubhavisikoṁbudu Eṁdu koṭṭa śile saubharayitu ti(ṁ)mmana vrālu .
Digital edition of SII 9.467 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
